startWelcome.title: 👋 Hi there!
startWelcome.intro: Just send me a message and we'll get going.
startWelcome.tip: New here? {help} shows what I can do. {new} starts a clean slate anytime.

groupCommand.telegramTip: Group chat: when typing a command manually, address it to me, for example {example}.

newSession.title: ✨ New {mode} started.
newSession.usage: Couldn't read that — use /new for a chat, or /new discuss for a discussion.
newSession.confirmBody: This starts a fresh {mode} session and discards the current conversation history.

acp.agentNotConfigured: External agent setup is incomplete for this bot.
acp.agentNotFound: The selected external agent is unavailable.
acp.agentNotEnabled: The selected external agent is disabled for this bot.
acp.codexOAuthIncomplete: Codex ChatGPT sign-in is not complete for this bot workspace.
acp.codexAuthTokenMissing: Codex authentication is missing or incomplete for this bot workspace.
acp.agentAuthInvalid: External agent authentication is invalid. Update the agent setup and try again.
acp.noWorkspaceExec: You do not have permission to run workspace commands for this bot.
acp.runtimeOwnerMissing: This external-agent session has no runtime owner. Start a new session to continue.
acp.discussUnsupported: This external agent cannot run in discuss mode.
acp.groupChatUnsupported: Group chats cannot create a chat-mode external-agent session. Use /new codex or /new discuss codex.
acp.projectModeInvalid: The external agent project mode is invalid.
acp.projectPathInvalid: The external agent project path must be absolute.
acp.displayArgsInvalid: The external agent display arguments are invalid.
acp.runtimeStartFailed: External agent runtime failed to start.
acp.runtimeBusy: External agent runtime is already processing a turn for this session.
acp.attachmentInvalid: The attachment is invalid. Please attach it again.
acp.attachmentUnavailable: The attachment could not be made available to the external agent. Please attach it again.
acp.imageInputUnsupported: This external agent cannot read the attached image.
acp.invalidChatRuntime: The selected chat runtime is invalid.

ops.template: ⚠️ Couldn't {verb} right now. Try again in a moment.

session.noActive: No active session found for this conversation.
session.unavailable: Session info isn't available right now.
session.noneForBot: No session found for this bot.

link.usage: Usage: /link <code> — connect this account to your Memoh user.
link.success: Connected. This account is now linked to your Memoh user and inherits your bot permissions.
link.expired: That link code has expired. Generate a new one in Memoh settings.
link.consumed: That link code was already used.
link.unavailable: Account linking is unavailable right now.
link.failed: Failed to link this account. Please try again.

top.approve: approve the latest or specified pending tool call
top.reject: reject the latest or specified pending tool call

help.globalHint: Tap a command above to run it.

settings.language: View or set the command UI language

language.show: View or set the command UI language

model.current: Show current chat and heartbeat models

reasoning.show: Show the reasoning level and pick a new one

memory.set: Set the memory provider for this bot

search.set: Set the search provider for this bot

fs.read: Read a file from the workspace

status.latest: Show the latest session status for this bot

context.show: Show context window usage for the current session

access.show: Show current identity, write access, and chat ACL context

compact.run: Compact the current session's context immediately

settings.title: ⚙️ Bot Settings
settings.unknownLanguage: Unknown language {value}. Choose auto, en, zh, or ja.
settings.updateUsage:
Usage: /settings update [options]

Options:
- --language <value>
- --acl_default_effect <allow|deny>
- --reasoning_enabled <true|false>
- --reasoning_effort <none|low|medium|high|xhigh>
- --heartbeat_enabled <true|false>
- --heartbeat_interval <minutes>
- --chat_model_id <id>
- --heartbeat_model_id <id>

(Command UI language: /settings language <auto|en|zh|ja>)

model.title: Chat Models
model.listChanged: Model list changed — reopen /model to pick again.
model.noneUnderProvider: No chat models under provider {provider}. Run {command} to see all providers.
model.empty:
No chat models yet.

Add a model in the web dashboard.
model.notFound: No model named {name}. Run {command} to see what's available.
model.notFoundUnderProvider: No model named {name} under provider {provider}. Run {command} to see what's available.
model.ambiguous: Model {name} is ambiguous — use a model ID or provider-qualified name ({candidates}).
model.serviceUnavailable: Model service isn't available right now.

memory.title: Memory Providers
memory.label: Memory provider
memory.empty:
No memory providers yet.

Memory providers give the bot long-term memory across conversations. Add one in the web dashboard.
memory.noneSet: No memory provider is set. See options with {list}, then choose one with {set}.
memory.notFound: No memory provider named {name}. See options with {command}.

search.title: Search Providers
search.label: Search provider
search.empty:
No search providers yet.

Search providers let the bot look things up on the web. Add one in the web dashboard.
search.noneSet: No search provider is set. See options with {list}, then choose one with {set}.
search.notFound: No search provider named {name}. See options with {command}.

skill.title: Skills
skill.unavailable: Skills aren't available for this bot.
skill.empty:
No skills yet.

Skills are reusable tools the bot can call. Add them in the web dashboard.

schedule.title: Schedules
schedule.createUsage:
Usage: /schedule create <name> <pattern> <command>
Example: /schedule create daily-report "0 9 * * *" "Send daily report"
schedule.notFound: No schedule named {name}. See schedules with {command}.

mcp.title: MCP Connections
mcp.empty:
No MCP connections yet.

MCP connections give the bot extra tools from external servers. Add one in the web dashboard.
mcp.notFound: No MCP connection named {name}. See connections with {command}.

email.providersEmpty:
No email providers yet.

Email providers let the bot send and receive mail. Add one in the web dashboard.
email.bindingsEmpty:
No email bindings yet.

A binding gives this bot an email address it can send from. Add one in the web dashboard.
email.outboxEmpty:
No emails sent yet.

Emails the bot sends will appear here.

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat Logs
heartbeat.empty:
No heartbeat logs yet.

Heartbeats are periodic autonomous check-ins. Runs appear here once heartbeat is enabled.
heartbeat.olderHint: Use the Web UI for older heartbeat logs.

usage.unavailable: Token usage isn't available right now.
usage.empty:
No token usage recorded yet.

Usage appears here after the bot answers a message.

fs.unavailable: The file browser isn't available right now.
fs.truncated: Showing the first 2000 characters. Use the web UI for the full file.

compact.noModel: No compaction or chat model is configured for this bot.

toolApproval.unavailable: ⚠️ Approvals aren't available here right now.
toolApproval.parseFailed: Couldn't read that. Reply to the request with /approve or /reject, or tap a button.

userInput.unavailable: ⚠️ User input responses aren't available here right now.
userInput.invalid: I couldn't match that answer. Try again.
userInput.selectHint: Reply with an option number or its text.
userInput.multiHint: Reply with multiple numbers separated by commas.
userInput.backHint: Send "back" to return to the previous question.
userInput.replyTextPrompt: Reply to this message with your answer.
userInput.replyCustomPrompt: Reply to this message with a custom answer.
userInput.invalidOperation: That action is no longer valid.
userInput.customNotAllowed: This question does not accept a custom answer.

reasoning.choosePrompt: Higher effort means more careful thinking, but slower replies. Choose a level:
reasoning.unknownLevel: Unknown level {level} — choose off, none, low, medium, high, or xhigh.

error.unknownCommand: Unknown command {command}. Run {help} to see what's available, or resend without the leading slash to send it as a regular message.
error.unknownCommandShort: Unknown command {command}. Run {help} to see all commands.
error.unknownAction: Unknown action {action} for {command}. Run {help} to see its actions.
error.ownerOnly: ⚠️ Only the bot owner can run {command}. You can still chat normally.
error.noAccess: ⚠️ You don't have access to this bot.
error.accessDeniedHint: ⚠️ You can't chat with this bot yet. If you're its owner, open the dashboard, copy a connection code, and send {link} <code> here to link your account.
error.accessDeniedManager: ⚠️ You can manage this bot, but Chat is disabled for this channel identity. Manage commands still work; ask the bot owner to enable Chat if this identity should send regular messages.
error.generic: ⚠️ Couldn't complete {command} right now. Try again in a moment.
error.genericNoResource: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.

error.unsupportedWebCommand: That slash command is not available in Web chat.
error.requestedSkillNotRuntimeUsable: Requested skill is not available for chat.
error.requestedSkillContextTooLarge: Requested skill context is too large.
error.slashAttachmentsUnsupported: Slash commands do not support attachments.
error.unsupportedSkillSlashContext: Requested skills are not supported in this context.
error.unsupportedLegacyEndpoint: This endpoint does not support requested skills.
error.invalidQuickActionScope: This quick action cannot be scoped to a session.
error.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to use that slash command.
error.reservedSkillMetadata: Reserved skill metadata cannot be supplied.
